assertion: Optimal local model routing on M4 Max (36GB): deepseek-r1:14b for speed-dominant tasks (summarization, structured output, quick reasoning), qwen2.5-coder:32b for reliability-critical code generation. Chain-of-thought visibility in deepseek is a differentiator for PoT auditability.
evidence: deepseek 3x faster on reasoning/structured output but 1 timeout on complex code
deepseek chain-of-thought visible — auditable thinking for PoT verification
qwen clean output — better for automated pipelines
Both run on M4 Max 36GB without issues — sovereign compute viable
